meta.title: My Life Coffee — Specialty Coffee in Riyadh
meta.description: Specialty coffee in An Nakhil, Riyadh. Precision brewing, warm hospitality, bilingual experience.

intro.title: My Life Coffee
intro.tag: Specialty coffee, made for your life.

bean.title: It starts with the bean.
bean.body: We source only specialty-grade beans, selected for their origin, altitude, and character. Every cup begins long before it reaches you.

craft.title: Crafted with intention.
craft.line2: Dialed in by our specialty-trained baristas.
craft.line3: Because good coffee is never an accident.

menuMoment.title: Everything you love, in one place.
menuMoment.titleAr: كل ما تحبه، في مكان واحد
menuMoment.body: From single-origin espresso to handcrafted seasonal drinks and house-made desserts — there is always a reason to come back.

cta.title: Your next cup is waiting.
cta.sub: My Life Coffee · Specialty coffee · An Nakhil, Riyadh

marquee.text: Specialty Coffee · قهوة مختصة · Riyadh · الرياض · Est. 2023 ·

tier2.title: Second prize
tier2.desc: Free drinks for you and three friends

story.title: More than coffee
story.p1: We believe specialty coffee is a daily ritual — measured, honest, and quietly luxurious. Our baristas dial in every shot with the care Riyadh’s coffee lovers deserve.
story.p2: From the first grind to the last sip, My Life Coffee is a space made for community: warm light, honest flavors, and cups worth slowing down for.

findUs.title: Find us
findUs.hoursNote: Confirm times with the café — placeholder schedule.
